selections.name: Zourrific
selections.reason: Top trial winner from the Snowden yard; elite jockey booking suggests readiness.

selections.name: Royal Air Force
selections.reason: Waller runner with race experience and the inside draw; maps perfectly.

selections.name: Short Sea
selections.reason: Solid trial form and gets a good run from a low gate.

selections.name: Baltusrol
selections.reason: Another Snowden debutant with nice trials; inside draw is a plus.

danger_horse.name: Royal Air Force
danger_horse.reason: Race experience and the inside draw make him a massive threat.

selections.name: Celestial Charm
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and boxed on steadily for 2nd; strips fitter and maps well.

selections.name: Ready Forcocktails
selections.reason: Resumes after a break; placed second in a small field last prep and trials indicate readiness.

selections.name: Artistic Lady
selections.reason: Hard fit and has been finishing off her races reasonably well; can sneak into the money.

selections.name: On Her Merits
selections.reason: Placed third-up previously and can improve off her recent run.

danger_horse.name: Ready Forcocktails
danger_horse.reason: Strong fresh form and gets a great run from the inside.

selections.name: Konsa (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak; strong closing sectionals last start suggest he is ready to win.

selections.name: Farset
selections.reason: Set the pace last start and was only narrowly beaten; will take catching from a forward position.

selections.name: Clanwilliam
selections.reason: Consistent form and maps to get a nice run just off the speed.

selections.name: Artgirl
selections.reason: Recent form is sound and she drops in weight; each-way claims.

danger_horse.name: Farset
danger_horse.reason: Pace advantage could make him hard to run down.

selections.name: Charlina
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up following a strong win; gets a handy claim and maps perfectly.

selections.name: Lull
selections.reason: Class runner of the field dropping back from Listed grade; major threat if she handles the weight.

selections.name: Hinzel
selections.reason: Resuming from a lengthy break but won his maiden impressively; can overcome the sticky gate.

selections.name: Jarrito
selections.reason: Talented filly who can sprint well fresh; low draw is a significant advantage.

danger_horse.name: Lull
danger_horse.reason: Class edge is significant if she gets the right run.

selections.name: Concordia Wind
selections.reason: Second-up after a strong placing; maps to get a beautiful run and looks hard to beat.

selections.name: Deep Pleasure
selections.reason: Faded late last start but maps well with the claim; capable of bouncing back.

selections.name: Virgil's Gift
selections.reason: Second-up after a fair return; strips fitter and will be prominent early.

selections.name: Thames
selections.reason: Third-up and a previous track/distance winner; carries weight but has class.

danger_horse.name: Deep Pleasure
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and claim make her very dangerous.

selections.name: So Suave (NZ)
selections.reason: Dominant win last start and is on an upward trajectory; clearly the one to beat.

selections.name: Black Babylon (IRE)
selections.reason: Consistent performer who chased hard last start; maps well and will be in the finish.

selections.name: Casual Connection (NZ)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and has genuine staying ability; the claim helps offset the big weight.

selections.name: Centenario (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak; boxed on steadily last start and maps well.

danger_horse.name: Black Babylon (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Excellent recent form and gets a nice run in transit.

selections.name: Supermassive
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and has strong form lines; should get every chance from the draw.

selections.name: Rimbaud
selections.reason: Progressing well and ran a solid third last start; looks ready to peak.

selections.name: Existential Bob (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming but has good fresh form; top stable and jockey combination.

selections.name: Mogwai
selections.reason: Forgive last start; previous form was excellent and can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Rimbaud
danger_horse.reason: Peaking third-up and has the tactical speed to challenge.
